creator: sfoster@mailbox.myzen.co.uk
text:
Upgrading to 1.36 broke my installation.

My program fails with: 
"Can't locate namespace/autoclean.pm in @INC (you may need to install the namespace::autoclean module) (@INC contains: /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.20 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.20/mach /usr/local/lib/perl5/5.20 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.20 /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/5.20/mach .) at /usr/local/lib/perl5/site_perl/mach/5.20/DateTime.pm line 8."

Installing devel/p5-namespace-autoclean solved the problem.
